mapper.insert:
insert into zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel( id, order_detail_id, order_id, order_no, delivery_id, delivery_no, delivery_detail_id, create_time, create_by, tenant_id ) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.orderDetailId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.deliveryId}, #{item.deliveryNo}, #{item.deliveryDetailId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.tenantId})
